script: बेटा सुन, कल सुबह डॉक्टर के यहाँ जाना है तो याद से खाली पेट आना, और आते वक़्त मेरी बीपी की दवा भी लेते आना, पर्ची मैंने तेरे पापा को भेज दी है। शाम को बुआ आ रही हैं खाने पर।

gold.summary: Mummy reminds about tomorrow morning's doctor visit — come on an empty stomach — and asks to bring her BP medicine on the way; the prescription is with Papa. Bua is coming over for dinner in the evening.
gold.translation: Beta listen, tomorrow morning we have to go to the doctor, so remember to come on an empty stomach, and while coming, bring my BP medicine too — I've sent the prescription to your Papa. Bua is coming over for dinner in the evening.

action_items.task: Come on an empty stomach for the doctor visit
Bring Mummy's BP medicine on the way

script: हाँ बेटा, कार्ड छप गए हैं। तू ऐसा कर, रविवार तक मेहमानों की फाइनल लिस्ट वाली एक्सेल मुझे भेज दे, और वर्मा जी को फोन करके पूछ लेना कि हलवाई का एडवांस दिया कि नहीं।

gold.summary: Papa says the wedding cards are printed, asks for the final guest-list spreadsheet by Sunday, and wants Verma ji called to check whether the caterer's advance was paid.
gold.translation: Yes beta, the cards have been printed. Do one thing — send me the Excel with the final guest list by Sunday, and call Verma ji to ask whether the caterer's advance has been paid or not.

action_items.task: Send Papa the final guest-list spreadsheet
Call Verma ji to check whether the caterer's advance was paid

script: अरे सुन, अम्मा का चश्मा बन गया है, लेंसकार्ट वाले का मैसेज आया था। आज शाम तक कलेक्ट कर लियो नहीं तो वीकेंड पे बहुत भीड़ हो जाती है। और हाँ, पिंकी के बर्थडे का गिफ्ट मैंने ले लिया है, तू मत लेना।

gold.summary: Didi says Amma's glasses are ready and should be collected by this evening to avoid the weekend rush; she has already bought Pinky's birthday gift, so no need to buy another.
gold.translation: Hey listen, Amma's glasses are ready, the Lenskart shop sent a message. Collect them by this evening, otherwise it gets very crowded on the weekend. And yes, I've already bought Pinky's birthday gift, so you don't buy one.

action_items.task: Collect Amma's glasses from the shop

script: बेटा, संडे को सोसाइटी की मीटिंग है पार्किंग वाले मसले पे, चार बजे। तुम आ जाना, तुम्हारे फ्लैट का भी मामला है। और सोच रहा था अगर टाइम मिले तो उसके बाद साथ में खाना खा लें कहीं।

gold.summary: Chacha asks to attend the society meeting on the parking issue this Sunday at 4 pm since it concerns the flat, and tentatively suggests eating out together afterwards.
gold.translation: Beta, there's a society meeting on Sunday about the parking issue, at four o'clock. You should come, it concerns your flat too. And I was thinking, if there's time, we could have a meal together somewhere afterwards.

action_items.task: Attend the society meeting on the parking issue
Have a meal together after the meeting

script: भाई, शादी में आने का पक्का कर। तू ऐसा कर, बीस तारीख़ तक टिकट बुक कर ले, बाद में किराया डबल हो जाएगा। रुकने की टेंशन मत ले, मेरे यहीं रुकना है तुझे।

gold.summary: Sandeep asks to confirm attendance at the wedding and to book the ticket by the 20th before fares double; staying arrangements are sorted at his place.
gold.translation: Brother, confirm that you're coming to the wedding. Do one thing — book your ticket by the 20th, the fare will double later. Don't worry about where to stay, you're staying at my place.

script: सुन, लौटते हुए सब्ज़ी मंडी से धनिया, अदरक और टमाटर लेते आना, घर में बिलकुल नहीं है। और गैस वाले को फोन कर दियो आज ही, सिलेंडर ख़त्म होने वाला है।

gold.summary: Mummy asks to pick up coriander, ginger and tomatoes from the vegetable market on the way back, and to call the gas agency today since the cylinder is about to run out.
gold.translation: Listen, on your way back pick up coriander, ginger and tomatoes from the vegetable market, there's none at all at home. And call the gas agency today itself, the cylinder is about to run out.

action_items.task: Buy coriander, ginger and tomatoes from the vegetable market on the way back
Call the gas agency to book a cylinder

script: और बता, सब बढ़िया? मैं सोच रहा था इस बार दिवाली पे सब लोग नैनीताल चलें, होटल वग़ैरह आराम से देख लेंगे। अभी कुछ फिक्स नहीं है, बस आइडिया है। मम्मी का भी मूड देख लेंगे।

gold.summary: Bhaiya floats the idea of a family trip to Nainital for Diwali; nothing is fixed yet, hotels can be looked at later and Mummy's mood will be gauged.
gold.translation: So tell me, all good? I was thinking that this Diwali all of us could go to Nainital, we'll look at hotels and all at leisure. Nothing is fixed yet, it's just an idea. We'll see what Mummy feels about it too.

action_items.task: Consider a family trip to Nainital

script: यार वो ज़ुम्बा क्लास वाली बात याद है? सोच रही हूँ अगले महीने से जॉइन कर ही लूँ, तू भी करेगी क्या साथ में? अभी पक्का नहीं है, पहले फीस पता करनी है। चल, बाद में बात करते हैं।

gold.summary: Priya is thinking of joining the Zumba class from next month and asks whether to join together; nothing is final until she finds out the fee.
gold.translation: Yaar, remember that Zumba class thing? I'm thinking of finally joining from next month — will you do it along with me? It's not certain yet, first I need to find out the fee. Okay, let's talk later.

action_items.task: Consider joining the Zumba class together
Find out the Zumba class fee

script: बेटा, शायद अगले हफ़्ते मेरा दिल्ली आना हो जाए, ऑफिस के काम से। प्रोग्राम बना तो उस वीकेंड की कोई मूवी की टिकट देख लेना, साथ चलेंगे, जैसे पुराने दिनों में। अभी पक्का नहीं है, बताती हूँ।

gold.summary: Maasi may visit Delhi next week for work; if the plan firms up, she suggests looking at movie tickets for that weekend to go together. Nothing is confirmed yet.
gold.translation: Beta, I might end up coming to Delhi next week for office work. If the plan works out, look at movie tickets for that weekend, we'll go together like in the old days. It's not confirmed yet, I'll let you know.

action_items.task: Look at movie tickets for the weekend if Maasi's Delhi visit happens

script: सुन, शर्मा सर वाले प्रोजेक्ट का जो हिसाब-किताब है, मैं सोच रहा था वीकेंड पे एक बार साथ बैठ के देख लें, अगर तू फ्री हो तो। कोई ज़बरदस्ती नहीं है, अगले हफ़्ते भी हो सकता है।

gold.summary: Arjun tentatively suggests sitting together over the weekend to go over the accounts of Sharma sir's project, if free; it can also happen next week.
gold.translation: Listen, about the accounts of Sharma sir's project — I was thinking we could sit together once over the weekend and go through it, if you're free. No compulsion, it can happen next week too.

action_items.task: Sit together to review the accounts of Sharma sir's project

script: जुग जुग जियो बेटा। कल बहू ने तेरी फोटो दिखाई, बहुत अच्छा लग रहा था तू। यहाँ सब ठीक है, घुटने का दर्द भी अब कम है। खाना टाइम से खाया कर। अच्छा, अब रखती हूँ।

gold.summary: Dadi sends blessings, says she liked the photo shown by Bahu, reports that all is well and her knee pain has reduced, and gives general advice to eat on time. No tasks.
gold.translation: Long may you live, beta. Yesterday Bahu showed me your photo, you were looking very nice. Everything is fine here, the knee pain is also less now. Do eat your meals on time. Okay, I'll hang up now.

script: हाँ बेटा, बिजली का बिल मैंने भर दिया है, तुझे करने की ज़रूरत नहीं। प्लंबर भी आ के नल ठीक कर गया। बस यही बताना था, और कुछ नहीं। अपना ध्यान रख।

gold.summary: Papa reports that he has already paid the electricity bill — no need to do it — and the plumber has fixed the tap. Just an update, nothing to do.
gold.translation: Yes beta, I have paid the electricity bill, you don't need to do it. The plumber also came and fixed the tap. That's all I wanted to tell you, nothing else. Take care of yourself.

script: अरे सुन ना, पता है क्या हुआ? नेहा की सगाई टूट गई, हाँ सच में! मुझे भी आज ही पता चला रश्मि से। वैसे किसी को बताना मत अभी। ओके बाय, मेरी क्लास शुरू हो रही है।

gold.summary: Meera shares gossip that Neha's engagement has broken off, which she just heard from Rashmi, and asks to keep it quiet for now. Pure chat, no tasks.
gold.translation: Hey listen, you know what happened? Neha's engagement broke off — yes, really! I found out only today from Rashmi. By the way, don't tell anyone yet. Okay bye, my class is starting.

script: बेटा, वो जो तूने अमेज़न से कुकर भेजा था ना, आज आ गया, बहुत बढ़िया है। पहली ही सीटी में दाल गल गई। तेरे पापा तो एकदम खुश हो गए। थैंक यू बेटा। चल, फिर बात होगी।

gold.summary: Mummy says the pressure cooker sent from Amazon arrived and works wonderfully — dal cooked in a single whistle — and Papa is delighted. Just a thank-you note, nothing to do.
gold.translation: Beta, that cooker you sent from Amazon — it arrived today, it's very good. The dal got cooked in the very first whistle. Your Papa was absolutely delighted. Thank you, beta. Okay, we'll talk later.

script: भाई, कल का मैच देखा? आख़िरी ओवर में तो मुझे हार्ट अटैक ही आ गया था। बुमराह क्या गेंद डाल रहा था यार। ऑफिस में आज सब इसी की बात कर रहे थे। चल, शाम को बात करते हैं।

gold.summary: Bhaiya raves about yesterday's cricket match — the nerve-racking last over and Bumrah's bowling — and says everyone at office was talking about it. Casual chat, no tasks.
gold.translation: Brother, did you watch yesterday's match? In the last over I nearly had a heart attack. What bowling Bumrah was doing, yaar. Everyone at office was talking about it today. Okay, let's talk in the evening.

script: बेटा, परसों तेरे पापा की आँखों का ऑपरेशन है और उसी दिन सुबह गैस वाला भी आने वाला है। मैं तो सारा दिन हॉस्पिटल में रहूँगी, और घर पे दरवाज़ा खोलने वाला कोई नहीं है। समझ रहा है ना मैं क्या कह रही हूँ?

gold.summary: On the day of Papa's eye operation, the day after tomorrow, the gas delivery is also due in the morning; Mummy will be at the hospital all day and no one is home to open the door — implying the listener needs to be there.
gold.translation: Beta, the day after tomorrow is your Papa's eye operation, and the gas man is also coming that same morning. I'll be at the hospital the whole day, and there's no one at home to open the door. You understand what I'm saying, right?

action_items.task: Be at home to receive the gas delivery while Mummy is at the hospital

script: बेटा, एक काम था। वो मेरा नया वाला फोन है ना, उसमें ट्रेन वाली ऐप डाउनलोड हो जाएगी क्या तुझसे संडे को? अगले महीने जयपुर जाना है, टिकट उसी से करनी है। हो जाएगा ना?

gold.summary: Papa asks, phrased as a question, whether the listener can install the train-booking app on his new phone on Sunday, since he needs it for next month's Jaipur tickets.
gold.translation: Beta, there was one thing. That new phone of mine — will you be able to download the train app on it this Sunday? I have to go to Jaipur next month, and the ticket has to be booked on that very app. It'll get done, right?

action_items.task: Install the train-booking app on Papa's new phone
